documentation_and_dependency_readiness.root_npm_posix_backend_script: cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m flask run --port=5050 --debug
documentation_and_dependency_readiness.root_npm_windows_backend_script: cd backend && set FLASK_ENV=development&& set PYTHONPATH=.&& .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m flask --app wsgi.py run --port=5050 --debug

recommended_macos_commands: cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m flask db upgrade
cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m flask seed
cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m flask seed-passives

required_setup_steps.reason: Provides compiler and git tooling expected by Python and Node dependency installation.
Keeps Python and Node aligned with the repository's documented local versions.

required_setup_steps.command: Install Docker Desktop for Mac with Apple Silicon support, then start Docker.
required_setup_steps.reason: PostgreSQL, Redis, and Compose validation depend on Docker Desktop locally.
Avoids Windows-only .venv\Scripts paths and keeps backend dependencies under backend/.venv.

required_setup_steps.command: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
required_setup_steps.reason: Installs Flask, pytest, psycopg2-binary, numpy, and other backend dependencies on macOS.
Uses lockfiles for root Electron tooling and frontend Vite tooling.
Confirms Compose files render on the MacBook before starting services.

warnings.details: Active local setup and health-check docs still center PowerShell, D:\Forge, and Windows venv commands. macOS equivalents are needed before the workflow is self-serve on a MacBook.
The README creates backend/.venv from inside backend, while root npm POSIX backend scripts call ../.venv/bin/python from backend. Pick one venv location or document the split explicitly for macOS.
PowerShell diagnostics remain useful on Windows but do not provide a native macOS/Linux equivalent.
Older migration and data-bundle docs contain D:\Forge paths and Windows interpreter examples. Treat them as historical evidence unless translated.
Python native-wheel packages and Electron download architecture should be validated on Apple Silicon with the chosen Python and Node versions.

conditions: Clone both repositories on macOS if last-epoch-data artifacts are needed.
Create macOS-local .env values and data-bundle paths instead of reusing D:\Forge paths.
Complete Docker, backend, frontend, and report reproducibility validation on the MacBook.
